dossier.stage_and_modality: Preclinical stage company developing in vivo CAR-T cell manufacturing using CRISPR-based approaches.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Demonstrated successful in vivo CAR-T cell generation in mouse models through direct CRISPR injection.
dossier.indications_pursued: Cancer indications, though specific tumor types have not been disclosed.
dossier.delivery_approach: Direct CRISPR injection system to manufacture CAR-T cells in vivo, eliminating ex vivo cell processing requirements.
dossier.key_differentiators: In vivo manufacturing approach that could eliminate costly ex vivo processing steps required by traditional CAR-T therapies. This direct injection method represents a potential transformation of cell therapy economics.
dossier.last_significant_event: March 2026 publication in Nature demonstrating successful in vivo CAR-T manufacturing in mouse models via CRISPR injection.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 clinical stage company developing in vivo gene writing approaches for genetic diseases and infectious diseases.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Phase 1/2 trial (NCT07227207) for TSRA-196 in Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency patients with PiZZ genotype, though trial is not yet recruiting.
dossier.indications_pursued: Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency (AATD) with lung and/or liver disease manifestations and HIV as a potential cure target.
dossier.delivery_approach: In vivo gene writing platform technology that eliminates the need for ex vivo cell manufacturing.
dossier.key_differentiators: Gene writing technology platform that enables direct in vivo genetic modifications, offering scalable treatment approach without ex vivo cell processing requirements.
dossier.last_significant_event: Received Gates Foundation grant in March 2026 to advance in vivo gene writing approaches for potential HIV cure applications.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage company developing in vivo CAR-T therapy using viral vector delivery approach.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Currently recruiting patients in Phase 1 dose-escalation study (NCT06528301) evaluating UB-VV111 in relapsed/refractory large B-cell lymphoma and chronic lymphocytic leukemia.
dossier.indications_pursued: Targeting B-cell hematologic malignancies including large B-cell lymphoma and chronic lymphocytic leukemia in relapsed/refractory setting.
dossier.delivery_approach: Viral vector-based in vivo delivery platform, as indicated by the UB-VV111 asset nomenclature suggesting viral vector technology.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial NCT06528301 for UB-VV111, currently in recruiting status.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage company with asset CPTX2309 in healthy volunteers and rheumatoid arthritis patients.
dossier.indications_pursued: Rheumatoid arthritis and systemic lupus erythematosus, focusing on moderate to severe disease.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1 trial NCT06917742 for CPTX2309 in healthy volunteers and rheumatoid arthritis patients, currently recruiting.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage company developing in vivo CAR-T therapies. Currently recruiting patients for their lead program KLN-1010.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: No disclosed efficacy or safety data available. The company is currently conducting a Phase 1 dose-escalation trial to determine safety, tolerability, and recommended Phase 2 dose.
dossier.indications_pursued: Targeting relapsed or refractory multiple myeloma. Focus appears to be on hematological malignancies based on current pipeline.
dossier.delivery_approach: In vivo CAR-T delivery platform, though specific delivery mechanism not disclosed in available data.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1 clinical trial NCT07075185 for KLN-1010 in relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma, currently recruiting patients.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Early clinical stage company developing in vivo CAR-T therapies with multiple Phase 1 trials recruiting. The company has at least two disclosed assets (JY231 and JY232) in clinical development.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: No clinical data has been disclosed yet. All trials are in early Phase 1 or recruiting stage focusing on safety, tolerability and initial efficacy assessments.
dossier.indications_pursued: Hematological malignancies including relapsed/refractory B-cell lymphomas, B-ALL, and multiple myeloma. Also pursuing refractory autoimmune diseases targeting CD19/BCMA.
dossier.delivery_approach: Injectable in vivo CAR-T platform with assets JY231 targeting CD19 for B-cell malignancies and JY232 targeting BCMA for multiple myeloma.
dossier.key_differentiators: Dual-target approach with CD19/BCMA combination therapy for autoimmune diseases represents a distinctive positioning. All trials are investigator-initiated single-center studies suggesting early-stage development model.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of recruiting for multiple Phase 1 trials, with the most recent being NCT07490951 for autoimmune diseases though not yet recruiting.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical development with HN2301 asset for autoimmune diseases. One active recruiting trial and one terminated trial identified.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Limited clinical data disclosure with one Phase 1 trial recruiting for systemic lupus erythematosus and scleroderma. Myasthenia gravis trial was terminated with no reported outcomes.
dossier.indications_pursued: Autoimmune diseases including systemic lupus erythematosus, scleroderma, and refractory myasthenia gravis. Focus appears to be on autoimmune disease applications rather than oncology.
dossier.last_significant_event: Termination of refractory myasthenia gravis trial (NCT06965309) for HN2301 with no reported data or reasons disclosed.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Preclinical stage developing in vivo CAR-T cell engineering technology using site-specific TRAC integration.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Nature publication demonstrating in vivo site-specific TRAC-CAR T cell engineering with tumor clearance in mouse models.
dossier.delivery_approach: In vivo site-specific TRAC integration technology that eliminates the need for ex vivo manufacturing.
dossier.key_differentiators: Site-specific TRAC integration approach that enables durable CAR-T efficacy while avoiding traditional ex vivo manufacturing complexity.
dossier.last_significant_event: Nature publication highlighting in vivo site-specific TRAC-CAR T cell engineering technology reported on March 18, 2026.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 clinical stage with EN-374 for X-linked chronic granulomatous disease currently recruiting patients.
dossier.indications_pursued: Primary focus on X-linked chronic granulomatous disease with EN-374, plus broader chronic granulomatous disease research activities.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiated Phase 1/2 clinical trial NCT06876363 for EN-374 in X-linked chronic granulomatous disease, currently recruiting participants.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage with multiple assets (SC262, SC291) in active trials across oncology and autoimmune indications.
dossier.indications_pursued: Oncology indications including Non-Hodgkin's lymphoma, large B-cell lymphoma, and chronic lymphocytic leukemia, plus autoimmune diseases including systemic lupus erythematosus.
dossier.key_differentiators: Developing distinct assets for both oncology (SC262) and autoimmune diseases (SC291), suggesting a dual-application platform approach.
dossier.last_significant_event: Three Phase 1 trials currently active but not recruiting as of 2024, evaluating safety, tolerability, and preliminary efficacy across multiple indications.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 development with intramuscular delivery approach for EVM14 in solid tumors.
dossier.indications_pursued: Selected solid tumors (EVM14), primary membranous nephropathy (EVER001), and primary IgA nephropathy (Nefecon).
dossier.delivery_approach: Intramuscular administration for EVM14; oral delivery for BTK inhibitor EVER001.
dossier.key_differentiators: EVM14 represents an intramuscular approach for solid tumors, while EVER001 is a highly selective oral covalent BTK inhibitor for proteinuric glomerular diseases.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of Phase 1/2 trial for EVM14 in selected solid tumors with intramuscular dosing alone and in combination with pembrolizumab.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1 clinical stage company developing in vivo CAR-T therapy using circular RNA delivered via lipid nanoparticles.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Currently recruiting patients for Phase 1 dose escalation study of TI-0032-III in relapsed/refractory autoimmune diseases.
dossier.indications_pursued: Autoimmune diseases including systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and Sjogren's syndrome.
dossier.delivery_approach: Lipid nanoparticles (LNPs) targeting T cells that deliver circular RNA encoding CD19 chimeric antigen receptor.
dossier.key_differentiators: Uses circular RNA platform for in vivo CAR-T generation rather than traditional ex vivo CAR-T manufacturing approaches.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiated Phase 1 clinical trial (NCT07413341) for TI-0032-III in autoimmune diseases.

dossier.stage_and_modality: Phase 1/2 clinical stage company developing ex vivo CAR-T cell therapies, not in vivo approaches
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Two Phase 1 trials recruiting patients with relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma using OriCAR-017, an anti-GPRC5D CAR-T product
dossier.indications_pursued: Relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma and solid tumors based on pipeline expansion plans
dossier.delivery_approach: Traditional ex vivo CAR-T cell manufacturing and infusion approach targeting GPRC5D
dossier.key_differentiators: Anti-GPRC5D targeting approach for multiple myeloma with planned expansion into solid tumor CAR-T therapies
dossier.last_significant_event: $110 million pre-IPO financing round closed in April 2026 to advance solid tumor CAR-T pipeline

dossier.stage_and_modality: CARsgen operates in ex vivo CAR-T cell therapy with multiple assets in Phase 1/2 clinical trials. The company has at least one commercially available CAR-T product (zevor-cel) with post-marketing studies underway.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: CT041 targeting claudin18.2 has progressed to Phase 1b/2 trials in gastric adenocarcinoma and pancreatic cancer with active enrollment status. Zevor-cel for relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma has achieved commercial approval and is in post-marketing Phase IV studies.
dossier.indications_pursued: The company targets solid tumors including gastric adenocarcinoma, pancreatic cancer, and hepatocellular carcinoma, as well as hematologic malignancies specifically relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma.
dossier.delivery_approach: CARsgen uses ex vivo CAR-T cell manufacturing approach where patient T cells are extracted, genetically modified, expanded, and reinfused as autologous CAR-T cell products.
dossier.key_differentiators: The company has successfully commercialized at least one CAR-T product (zevor-cel) and demonstrates dual focus on both solid tumor and hematologic applications. Their CT041 asset specifically targets claudin18.2, a solid tumor antigen.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of CT011 Phase 1b trial for hepatocellular carcinoma patients at risk of recurrence after surgical resection (NCT06560827, currently recruiting).

dossier.stage_and_modality: Early Phase 1 to Phase 3 development with three active recruiting trials testing in vivo cell therapy approaches across hematologic malignancies and solid tumors.
dossier.best_disclosed_data: Phase 3 trial (NCT07103668) evaluating IMC002 in CLDN18.2-positive gastric adenocarcinoma represents the most advanced program, comparing objective response rate and progression-free survival versus investigator's choice of treatment.
dossier.indications_pursued: Hematologic malignancies including relapsed/refractory B-cell non-Hodgkin lymphoma and multiple myeloma, plus solid tumors specifically CLDN18.2-positive gastric adenocarcinoma.
dossier.key_differentiators: Portfolio spans both hematologic and solid tumor indications with targeting of CLDN18.2 in gastric cancer representing a differentiated solid tumor approach.
dossier.last_significant_event: Initiation of three clinical trials currently in recruiting status across their pipeline assets IMV101, IMV102, and IMC002.
